args.code: (() => { const funcs = ['advanceStory', 'nextScene', 'startGame', 'showGame', 'initGame', 'loadGame', 'skipIntro', 'skipStory', 'startGameLoop']; for (const f of funcs) { if (typeof window[f] === 'function') { try { window[f](); return 'called ' + f; } catch(e) { return 'error calling ' + f + ': ' + e.message; } } } return 'no known functions found'; })()
